title: Trabees
description: This simple resource pack adds custom bees (dubbed "Trabees") to the game. Cursed, but fun!
body:
You know what? Screw you! _Untextures your entity features_

With this beautiful™ pack, I've added the creator of [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures/versions)/[EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features/versions)/[ESF](https://modrinth.com/mod/esf/versions) to the game in the form of a bee! This idea was inspired in the [Traben's Modding Server Discord](https://discord.com/invite/rURmwrzUcz) by the user [CerifiedBnunyThingy](https://discord.com/channels/950942125225283634/950945904884604968/1257703655583256657)! It went through a lot of little modifications before we finally settled on a final version, but I think it's hilarious

To obtain the Trabee, simply get your name tag and name the bee "Benjamin"
